failures.description: The agent failed because it incorrectly synthesized the tool results and omitted a qualifying product (item_id 5312063289, price 195.15) from the final answer.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify all available skateboards with deck material=bamboo priced above $194.56. Up to index 4, the agent had all required information from ProductCatalogSearch. The tool output at index 3 listed four qualifying items above the threshold: 4293355847 ($200.8), 5312063289 ($195.15), 6956751343 ($217.06), and 8176740019 ($208.6). At index 4, the Executor produced an answer with only three items, omitting 5312063289. This is grounded in a misread or incomplete use of the tool output rather than missing information, wrong user intent, or a malformed tool call.
